name: Cmor Nimman by Recall Hotels
detail: I have stayed here during my Songran trip in Chiang Mai (13-15 Apr 17). Overall service is quite impressive and beyond our expectation a lot. Nice & welcome staffs always showed their willing to help us arranging things we might need and also gave us some useful advice about tourist attraction spot should not miss. The room (I chose Deluxe room) is new, clean, comfortable and fully furnished with modern decorations & amenities which build the warm & relaxing atmosphere for guests during on vacation here. Breakfast food line was ok, even not that much various though still beyond our expectation. Picture of hotel & room shown on website and what we saw by ourselves on visiting is not delusive (similarly). And we even surprised on the first date of our arrival. I come with my family (4 persons) and reserve 2 deluxe rooms. Once we check-in, we found that our rooms were not on the same floor due to no any other vacant same type of room in the same floor during our trip period. We accepted and move to that on another floor. But not yet move our luggage, helpful staff come and said to us that the hotel allowed room upgrading for us so that we can have 2 rooms on the same floor (on opposite side). This's really great and quite appreciated us, they proceed free-upgrading room type from Deluxe to Junior suite for us instantly OMG!!. With no doubt next time visiting Chiang Mai where I would stay and take vacation on. See u next time ka, Cmor Hotel.....Thank you again.

name: Sapan Residence
area: Chiang Mai Riverside,Chiang Mai - View on map

name: R.C.N. Court & Inn
detail: Was looking for quiet in Chiang Mai (as a very light sleeper) and this was definitely the right place...on a quiet alleyway and the upper rooms have a nice view of the neighboring wat. Originally I planned to stay for just 1 night ended up staying for 5 or 6. The owners are great and very outgoing and helpful. Should mention this isn't really the place to meet younger travelers (most people staying here were older) but it was a nice place to come 'home' to after a long day. Will miss it.
area: Old City,Chiang Mai - View on map

name: Kokotel Chiang Mai Nimman
detail: 1. Comparing with the other hotels in Chiang Mai, Kokotel's price is very cheap. 2. The location is far away from the Old Town (4km which is not able to walk under the hot weather). You always need to take the tuk-tuk or songthaew to the Old Town. The hotel is near the Nimman District and you are able to take a walk about 10 minutes to the Nimman District. The location of the hotel is difficult to describe, most of the drivers did not realize the exact location. It would be better to ask the Road Number in Thailand Language in order to tell the tuk-tuk / songthaew drivers. 3. Room is clean and the toilet is also clean. 4. Staff is nice and helpful. They will provide the tourist information for you such as the Saturday/ Sunday night market. 5. Providing a breadfast starting from 07:00AM to 10:00AM. Helping us to call the airport taxi service at mid-night. Although the taxi service is not provided by the hotel, the taxi driver is also polite and helping us to take the luggage.

name: R1 Nimman Hotel Chiangmai
detail: We went to hospital for medical check up and went sight seeing around chiang mai. The location of R1 was center of nimann .so we could go both side.

name: Pause and Play Hotel
detail: Chiang Mai can get real expensive during the high season, but this hotel is one of the rare finds when you're not looking to bunk with strangers in a hostel. Located a bit outside the city center, you can definitely find all you need for a good night sleep. The staffs are super friendly, rooms are clean, and the location is peaceful and quiet. There were a few flaws to my stay: the room phone we're wired when we arrived, the bathroom smelled a bit funky, the door lock wasn't working, and the shower was a bit broken, but the staffs handled them very swift and professionally and we were all good by the second day of the stay. It might not be as convenient to get here if you don't have a mode of personal transportation (rented car or bike), but if you do, there's plenty of roofed parking available with 24 hours security. Overall it was a pleasant experience, would come by again if I ever need another budget stay in Chiang Mai.

area: Tha Phae,Chiang Mai - View on map

name: BEDGASM Hotel x Cafe @Nimman
detail: I decided to book two weeks here, got a good price from Agoda.com and I spent a little bit extra for the larger bed. The location was just perfect! I did a lot of meet ups here for the 'Digital Nomad' Community and all meets and events where very close to the hotel. Its location to the MAYA shopping mall was perfect as well, its a new hotel so most of the TukTuk's and taxi drivers didnt know the location but they all knew the MAYA shopping center and that made it really easy. Everything about the room was great, the bed was really comfortable (better than my own bed!!) The air conditioning unit was really modern and powerfull. Internet was also fantastic, I had intended on using working spaces around chiang mai but most of the time I was easily able to work in the room just using wifi on my chromebook. I often needed to do remote desktop work which can be sluggish on slow connections. but it was fine. Breakfast was great and the whole hotel in general was clean airy and very friendly. Would reccomend without hesitation!
